text:
Market today: Momentum names, including many of your tech/chip plays, are hitting a wall. Headline #3 points to the biggest unwind since 2001, which is a direct headwind for your concentrated book.

Your holdings: SOXL is down a painful -34.95% and flagged "SELL." SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is also deeply in the red at -37.57%. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your leveraged positions (SOXL, SPAL) for further weakness. Also, watch for continued rotation out of tech momentum into other sectors.

Bottom line: Risk management on your leveraged, underperforming tech positions is paramount right now.
plays: SOXL is flagged "SELL" and down 34.95%. Your default stop at 200 is above the current price; re-evaluate this stop and consider trimming or exiting to cut losses given the leverage and decay.
SPAL, a new leveraged position, is already down 37.57%. Its default stop at 21.38 is also above current price; adjust this stop immediately to protect capital.
Consider a small hedge with SOXS (inverse semis). Scanner shows ACCUMULATE at 45.83-45.73 entry with a stop at 45.4. This could offset some tech weakness.
